task_context.actionable_question: What should I do differently starting next week?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Synthesise all [FE] risk signals into 3–5 prioritised actions. Reference which FE feature triggered each item.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You have two prioritized actions to help you improve your academic performance. These actions are based on your current situation and the feedback you've received. Triggered supported action provenance: rule_id=S-T13-R06; action_id=student_request_advisor_check_in; owner=student; priority=high; time_horizon_days=3; evidence_item_ids=['ev-synthesis_data-0-at_risk_score', 'ev-synthesis_data-0-at_risk_label']; action=Request a short advisor check-in to review the combined signals and choose the first support step. | rule_id=S-T13-R03; action_id=student_review_recent_assessment_feedback; owner=student; priority=medium; time_horizon_days=7; evidence_item_ids=['ev-synthesis_data-0-performance_trend']; action=Review feedback from your most recent assessments and write down one change to apply next week..

Insights: Advisor Check-In Needed: Requesting a short advisor check-in is crucial as your at-risk score is high, indicating a need for support. This action is prioritized as high and should be completed within 3 days. | Reflect on Assessment Feedback: Reviewing feedback from your recent assessments is important for your growth. This action is medium priority and should be done within 7 days.

Warnings: Conflicting evidence was detected and must remain visible in the generated explanation.

insights.title: Advisor Check-In Needed
insights.description: Requesting a short advisor check-in is crucial as your at-risk score is high, indicating a need for support. This action is prioritized as high and should be completed within 3 days.

evidence.context: High at-risk label indicates significant concern.

insights.title: Reflect on Assessment Feedback
insights.description: Reviewing feedback from your recent assessments is important for your growth. This action is medium priority and should be done within 7 days.

evidence.context: Negative performance trend suggests a need for change.

warnings: Conflicting evidence was detected and must remain visible in the generated explanation.

confidence.reason: The data used to generate these actions is complete and reliable.

task_output_contract: Explain only actions already present in prioritized_actions or supported action-rule evidence.
Do not create duplicate recommendations; explanation.recommendations may be empty by design.
For every explained action, connect it to rule_evaluations, action_evidence_links, evidence_items, owner, priority, and time horizon when supplied.
If no supported action exists, say that only when missing_evidence/unsupported_actions/rule output supports it.
Explain only prioritized_actions whose rule_evaluation is triggered, preserving action and rule provenance.
If prioritized_actions is empty, explicitly state that no supported action was triggered.
v3_warnings: Task-aware V3 prompt exceeded the configured soft token ratio (25.1261 > 1.2).
Task-aware V3 prompt remained above the experimental safety ratio after optional evidence trimming; raw rows were preserved.

prioritized_actions.action_text: Request a short advisor check-in to review the combined signals and choose the first support step.
claim_limits: Treat the composite score as a screening signal, not a diagnosis.
Do not use lifestyle_risk_score as action evidence.

prioritized_actions.action_text: Review feedback from your most recent assessments and write down one change to apply next week.
claim_limits: Do not claim the slope proves future decline.
Do not infer a cause for the trend.

summarization_warnings: Conflicting evidence was detected and must remain visible in the generated explanation.
The LLM may paraphrase prioritized_actions but must not invent new actions or rules.

required_core_outputs.description: Explain the supported actions already generated or exposed by the action_synthesis rule contract; do not require the explanation model to invent actions outside the returned or triggered action set.
For each supported action that is present, explain the triggering FE feature, threshold or rule evidence when available.

evaluation_constraints.description: Do not include or endorse actions that reference signals not present in returned data or the supplied action-rule contract.
Do not invent risk context, urgency, priority, or additional actions unsupported by returned feature-engineered signals or supported action evidence.

If no supported action is returned or triggered, saying no supported action is available is acceptable; penalize that only when deterministic action evidence shows at least one supported action exists.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
